title: Cuneiform Tablet #0750: Ur III School Tablet
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Ur III period — a school tablet document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Ur III period — a school tablet document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Ur III period. School Tablet document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records school tablet matters typical of Ur III period administrative or literary practice.
